title: Announcing Google Antigravity SDK
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first workflow. It enables developers to operate at a task-oriented level by managing agents across workspaces, editor, terminal, and browser for autonomous planning and execution of complex software development tasks.
